_comment: Per-project hooks for Python projects. Copy this file to .claude/settings.json in your repo.

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff check --fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>&1 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff format $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>&1 || true; fi
